productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed White T-shirt
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front with yellow flock detailing Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The graphic print of surreal opinionated characters are given a breath of life with the flock detailing, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Team it with jeans, carpis or shorts. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7' and chest 33"
